name: Liam Novak
title: Quantitative Analyst
summary: Quant analyst at a multi-strategy hedge fund. Builds and validates systematic equity and derivatives signals. Focuses on factor research and risk-adjusted return optimization. Prior internship at Citadel.

highlights: Developed equity factor model (momentum, value, quality) with 0.91 Sharpe in backtest across 2010–2023
Built derivatives pricing library in Python used by 4 portfolio managers
Owns daily VaR/CVaR reporting for $500M multi-strategy book
Supported rates desk with interest rate model calibration and scenario analysis
Automated Monte Carlo simulation workflows cutting overnight batch time by 40%
Researched intraday momentum signals in US equities
